content: I'll check the workspace structure to understand what this MushTech Studio reset task should do.Summary: MushTech Studio workspace remotion-dev has been reset to a clean state. The workspace contained only OpenClaw configuration files (AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, USER.md, IDENTITY.md, TOLS.md, BOOTSTRAP.md, HEARTBEAT.md, and .openclaw workspace state) which have been committed as an initial commit. The workspace is now ready for fresh Remotion video development work. This is part of a larger MushTech Studio setup with multiple team-specific workspaces (dev-kai, doc-iris, lead-waren, mush-pm, pm-alex, qa-zoe, script-writer, team, team-shared, ui-luna, video-director, video-editor, visual-designer).
